# SecKeyImportExportFlags

**Structure**

The import/export parameter structure flags.

## Declaration

```swift
struct SecKeyImportExportFlags
```

## Overview

Use an instance of this structure to set the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemImportExportKeyParameters/flags] property in the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemImportExportKeyParameters] import/export structure.

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**: Initialize a key import/export flag structure.

## Constants

- **importOnlyOne**: A flag that you set to prevent importing more than one private key.
- **securePassphrase**: A flag that indicates the user should be prompted for a passphrase on import or export.
- **noAccessControl**: A flag that indicates imported private keys have no access object attached to them.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- ExpressibleByArrayLiteral
- OptionSet
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
- SetAlgebra
